gaps: The provisioned snapshot lacked party names, docket entries, filing dates, originating court, case type, and legal issue text.
The committed statpack available in this checkout did not expose a named modern discretionary-cert cut in the rendered Markdown or machine JSON.
helpful: The path resolver identified the event and snapshot locations.
The committed statpack provided broad SCOTUS petition base-rate context.
notes: I avoided broad corpus retrieval because the snapshot was a bare docket identifier and a generic SCOTUS query risked surfacing the same case's resolved outcome.
